message:
chore: update Cargo.lock (tru 0.2.1→0.2.2) and sync issue tracker

Cargo.lock picks up tru version bump from 0.2.1 to 0.2.2.

Issue tracker reflects closed PayPal V3 contract bead (6.2.1) and
closed Square V3 contract bead (6.3.1) after completing their
manifest boundary definitions, README documentation, and validation.
